EnhancedErrorServer struct {\n129\t\t*ConfigurableErrorServer\n130\t\n131\t\t// Scenarios holds the enhanced error scenarios\n132\t\tEnhancedScenarios []EnhancedErrorScenario\n133\t\n134\t\t// RequestCounter tracks total requests for frequency calculation\n135\t\tRequestCounter uint64\n136\t\n137\t\t// ErrorCounter tracks errors injected for frequency calculation\n138\t\tErrorCounter uint64\n139\t\n140\t\t// RandomSource provides deterministic randomness for testing\n141\t\tRandomSource *rand.Rand\n142\t}\n143\t\n144\t// NewEnhancedErrorServer creates a new server with enhanced error injection.\n145\t//\n146\t// This server supports advanced error scenarios with severity levels,\n147\t// frequency control, and probability-based injection.\n148\t//\n149\t// Parameters:\n150\t//   - scenarios: List of enhanced error scenarios\n151\t//\n152\t// Returns:\n153\t//   - *EnhancedErrorServer: Configured enhanced test server\n154\t//\n155\t// Example:\n156\t//\n157\t//\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n158\t//\t    {\n159\t//\t        Type: ErrorTypeRateLimit,\n160\t//\t        Severity: ErrorSeverityMedium,\n161\t//\t        Frequency: 0.3, // 30% of requests\n162\t//\t        RetryAfter: 5 * time.Second,\n163\t//\t    },\n164\t//\t}\n165\t//\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n166\t//\tdefer server.Close()\n167\tfunc NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios []EnhancedErrorScenario) *EnhancedErrorServer {\n168\t\t// Convert enhanced scenarios to base scenarios\n169\t\tbaseScenarios := make([]ErrorServerScenario, len(scenarios))\n170\t\tfor i, scenario := range scenarios {\n171\t\t\tbaseScenarios[i] = scenario.ErrorServerScenario\n172\t\t\t// Apply enhanced defaults\n173\t\t\tif baseScenarios[i].StatusCode == 0 {\n174\t\t\t\tbaseScenarios[i].StatusCode = scenario.getDefaultStatusCode()\n175\t\t\t}\n176\t\t\tif baseScenarios[i].ErrorCode == \"\" && scenario.ErrorCodeOverride == \"\" {\n177\t\t\t\tbaseScenarios[i].ErrorCode = scenario.getDefaultErrorCode()\n178\t\t\t}\n179\t\t\tif baseScenarios[i].Message == \"\" && scenario.MessageOverride == \"\" {\n180\t\t\t\tbaseScenarios[i].Message = scenario.getDefaultMessage()\n181\t\t\t}\n182\t\t}\n183\t\n184\t\tbaseServer := NewConfigurableErrorServer(baseScenarios)\n185\t\n186\t\treturn &EnhancedErrorServer{\n187\t\t\tConfigurableErrorServer: baseServer,\n188\t\t\tEnhancedScenarios:        scenarios,\n189\t\t\tRandomSource:            rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())),\n190\t\t}\n191\t}\n192\t\n193\t// NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed creates a server with deterministic randomness.\n194\t//\n195\t// This variant uses a fixed seed for reproducible test behavior.\n196\t//\n197\t// Parameters:\n198\t//   - scenarios: List of enhanced error scenarios\n199\t//   - seed: Random seed for deterministic behavior\n200\t//\n201\t// Returns:\n202\t//   - *EnhancedErrorServer: Configured enhanced test server with deterministic randomness\n203\tfunc NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios []EnhancedErrorScenario, seed int64) *EnhancedErrorServer {\n204\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n205\t\tserver.RandomSource = rand.New(rand.NewSource(seed))\n206\t\treturn server\n207\t}\n208\t\n209\t// ShouldInjectError determines if an error should be injected based on configuration.\n210\tfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) ShouldInjectError(scenario EnhancedErrorScenario, r *http.Request) bool {\n211\t\tatomic.AddUint64(&s.RequestCounter, 1)\n212\t\n213\t\t// Check condition first\n214\t\tif scenario.Condition != nil && !scenario.Condition(r) {\n215\t\t\treturn false\n216\t\t}\n217\t\n218\t\t// Check intercept flag\n219\t\tif scenario.Intercept {\n220\t\t\treturn true\n221\t\t}\n222\t\n223\t\t// Calculate effective probability\n224\t\teffectiveProbability := scenario.Frequency\n225\t\n226\t\t// If both are set, combine them\n227\t\tif scenario.Probability > 0 && scenario.Frequency > 0 {\n228\t\t\t// Independent evaluation: both must pass\n229\t\t\tif s.RandomSource.Float64() > scenario.Probability {\n230\t\t\t\treturn false\n231\t\t\t}\n232\t\t\teffectiveProbability = scenario.Frequency\n233\t\t} else if scenario.Probability > 0 {\n234\t\t\teffectiveProbability = scenario.Probability\n235\t\t}\n236\t\n237\t\t// Roll the dice\n238\t\tshouldInject := s.RandomSource.Float64() < effectiveProbability\n239\t\n240\t\tif shouldInject {\n241\t\t\tatomic.AddUint64(&s.ErrorCounter, 1)\n242\t\t}\n243\t\n244\t\treturn shouldInject\n245\t}\n246\t\n247\t// GetErrorRate returns the actual error rate (errors / total requests).\n248\tfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) GetErrorRate() float64 {\n249\t\ttotal := atomic.LoadUint64(&s.RequestCounter)\n250\t\terrors := atomic.LoadUint64(&s.ErrorCounter)\n251\t\n252\t\tif total == 0 {\n253\t\t\treturn 0.0\n254\t\t}\n255\t\n256\t\treturn float64(errors) / float64(total)\n257\t}\n258\t\n259\t// GetStats returns error injection statistics.\n260\tfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) GetStats() (total uint64, errors uint64, rate float64) {\n261\t\ttotal = atomic.LoadUint64(&s.RequestCounter)\n262\t\terrors = atomic.LoadUint64(&s.ErrorCounter)\n263\t\trate = s.GetErrorRate()\n264\t\treturn\n265\t}\n266\t\n267\t// ResetCounters resets the request and error counters.\n268\tfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) ResetCounters() {\n269\t\tatomic.StoreUint64(&s.RequestCounter, 0)\n270\t\tatomic.StoreUint64(&s.ErrorCounter, 0)\n271\t}\n272\t\n273\t// =============================================================================\n274\t// ENHANCED ERROR SCENARIO METHODS\n275\t// =============================================================================\n276\t\n277\t// getDefaultStatusCode returns the default HTTP status code for the error type.\n278\tfunc (s *EnhancedErrorScenario) getDefaultStatusCode() int {\n279\t\tswitch s.Type {\n280\t\tcase ErrorTypeRateLimit:\n281\t\t\treturn 429\n282\t\tcase ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable:\n283\t\t\treturn 503\n284\t\tcase ErrorTypeInternalError:\n285\t\t\treturn 500\n286\t\tcase ErrorTypeBadRequest:\n287\t\t\treturn 400\n288\t\tcase ErrorTypeUnauthorized:\n289\t\t\treturn 401\n290\t\tcase ErrorTypeForbidden:\n291\t\t\treturn 403\n292\t\tcase ErrorTypeNotFound:\n293\t\t\treturn 404\n294\t\tcase ErrorTypeTimeout:\n295\t\t\treturn 408 // Request Timeout\n296\t\tcase ErrorTypeConnectionRefused:\n297\t\t\treturn 503 // Service Unavailable (simulated)\n298\t\tcase ErrorTypeSlowResponse:\n299\t\t\treturn 200 // Success, but slow\n300\t\tdefault:\n301\t\t\treturn 500\n302\t\t}\n303\t}\n304\t\n305\t// getDefaultErrorCode returns the default S3 error code for the error type.\n306\tfunc (s *EnhancedErrorScenario) getDefaultErrorCode() string {\n307\t\tif s.ErrorCodeOverride != \"\" {\n308\t\t\treturn s.ErrorCodeOverride\n309\t\t}\n310\t\n311\t\tswitch s.Type {\n312\t\tcase ErrorTypeRateLimit:\n313\t\t\treturn \"SlowDown\" // S3 rate limit error\n314\t\tcase ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable:\n315\t\t\treturn \"ServiceUnavailable\"\n316\t\tcase ErrorTypeInternalError:\n317\t\t\treturn ErrorCodeInternalError\n318\t\tcase ErrorTypeBadRequest:\n319\t\t\treturn ErrorCodeInvalidRequest\n320\t\tcase ErrorTypeUnauthorized:\n321\t\t\treturn \"Unauthorized\"\n322\t\tcase ErrorTypeForbidden:\n323\t\t\treturn ErrorCodeAccessDenied\n324\t\tcase ErrorTypeNotFound:\n325\t\t\treturn ErrorCodeNoSuchKey\n326\t\tcase ErrorTypeTimeout:\n327\t\t\treturn \"RequestTimeout\"\n328\t\tcase ErrorTypeConnectionRefused:\n329\t\t\treturn \"ServiceUnavailable\"\n330\t\tcase ErrorTypeSlowResponse:\n331\t\t\treturn \"\" // No error for slow success\n332\t\tdefault:\n333\t\t\treturn ErrorCodeInternalError\n334\t\t}\n335\t}\n336\t\n337\t// getDefaultMessage returns the default error message for the error type.\n338\tfunc (s *EnhancedErrorScenario) getDefaultMessage() string {\n339\t\tif s.MessageOverride != \"\" {\n340\t\t\treturn s.MessageOverride\n341\t\t}\n342\t\n343\t\tswitch s.Type {\n344\t\tcase ErrorTypeRateLimit:\n345\t\t\treturn \"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry later.\"\n346\t\tcase ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable:\n347\t\t\treturn \"Service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry later.\"\n348\t\tcase ErrorTypeInternalError:\n349\t\t\treturn \"An internal error occurred. Please retry.\"\n350\t\tcase ErrorTypeBadRequest:\n351\t\t\treturn \"The request is invalid or malformed.\"\n352\t\tcase ErrorTypeUnauthorized:\n353\t\t\treturn \"Authentication is required to access this resource.\"\n354\t\tcase ErrorTypeForbidden:\n355\t\t\treturn \"Access to this resource is denied.\"\n356\t\tcase ErrorTypeNotFound:\n357\t\t\treturn \"The specified resource does not exist.\"\n358\t\tcase ErrorTypeTimeout:\n359\t\t\treturn \"The request timed out. Please retry.\"\n360\t\tcase ErrorTypeConnectionRefused:\n361\t\t\treturn \"Connection to the service failed. Please check your network and retry.\"\n362\t\tcase ErrorTypeSlowResponse:\n363\t\t\treturn \"Request processed successfully\"\n364\t\tdefault:\n365\t\t\treturn \"An error occurred. Please retry.\"\n366\t\t}\n367\t}\n368\t\n369\t// =============================================================================\n370\t// CONVENIENCE FUNCTIONS FOR ENHANCED SCENARIOS\n371\t// =============================================================================\n372\t\n373\t// NewRateLimitScenario creates a rate limit error scenario.\n374\t//\n375\t// This convenience function creates a scenario for testing rate limit handling.\n376\t//\n377\t// Parameters:\n378\t//   - frequency: How often to inject this error (0.0 to 1.0)\n379\t//   - retryAfter: Suggested retry duration\n380\t//\n381\t// Returns:\n382\t//   - EnhancedErrorScenario: Configured rate limit scenario\n383\tfunc NewRateLimitScenario(frequency float64, retryAfter time.Duration) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n384\t\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n385\t\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n386\t\t\t\tStatusCode: 429,\n387\t\t\t\tErrorCode:  \"SlowDown\",\n388\t\t\t\tMessage:    \"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry later.\",\n389\t\t\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\n390\t\t\t\t\t\"Content-Type\":  \"application/xml\",\n391\t\t\t\t\t\"Retry-After\":   fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0f\", retryAfter.Seconds()),\n392\t\t\t\t\t\"X-RateLimit-Limit\": \"100\",\n393\t\t\t\t\t\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\": \"0\",\n394\t\t\t\t\t\"X-RateLimit-Reset\": fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", time.Now().Add(retryAfter).Unix()),\n395\t\t\t\t},\n396\t\t\t},\n397\t\t\tType:       ErrorTypeRateLimit,\n398\t\t\tSeverity:   ErrorSeverityMedium,\n399\t\t\tFrequency:  frequency,\n400\t\t\tRetryAfter: retryAfter,\n401\t\t}\n402\t}\n403\t\n404\t// NewTimeoutScenario creates a timeout error scenario.\n405\t//\n406\t// This convenience function creates a scenario for testing timeout handling.\n407\t//\n408\t// Parameters:\n409\t//   - frequency: How often to inject this error (0.0 to 1.0)\n410\t//   - delay: Delay before responding (simulates slow server)\n411\t//\n412\t// Returns:\n413\t//   - EnhancedErrorScenario: Configured timeout scenario\n414\tfunc NewTimeoutScenario(frequency float64, delay time.Duration) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n415\t\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n416\t\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n417\t\t\t\tStatusCode: 408,\n418\t\t\t\tErrorCode:  \"RequestTimeout\",\n419\t\t\t\tMessage:    \"The request timed out. retry\n580\t\t\t\t},\n581\t\t\t},\n582\t\t\tType:      errorType,\n583\t\t\tSeverity:  ErrorSeverityCritical,\n584\t\t\tFrequency: frequency,\n585\t\t}\n586\t}\n587\t\n588\t// =============================================================================\n589\t// PRECONFIGURED ENHANCED SCENARIOS\n590\t// =============================================================================\n591\t\n592\t// PreconfiguredEnhancedScenarios provides ready-to-use enhanced error scenarios.\n593\tvar PreconfiguredEnhancedScenarios = struct {\n594\t\t// OccasionalRateLimit injects rate limits 10% of the time\n595\t\tOccasionalRateLimit EnhancedErrorScenario\n596\t\n597\t\t// FrequentTimeouts Package server provides enhanced test server infrastructure for error testing.\n//\n// # Enhanced Error Server Setup\n//\n// This file extends the base error_server_setup.go with advanced error injection\n// capabilities including severity levels, frequency control, and probability-based\n// error scenarios.\n//\n// Usage:\n//   server := NewEnhancedErrorServer([]EnhancedErrorScenario{\n//       {Type: ErrorTypeRateLimit, Severity: ErrorSeverityHigh, Frequency: 0.5},\n//   })\n//   defer server.Close()\npackage server\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math/rand\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"sync/atomic\"\n\t\"time\"\n)\n\n// =============================================================================\n// ERROR TYPE DEFINITIONS\n// =============================================================================\n\n// ErrorType represents the category of error to inject.\ntype ErrorType string\n\nconst (\n\t// ErrorTypeTimeout simulates timeout scenarios (uses Delay field)\n\tErrorTypeTimeout ErrorType = \"timeout\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeRateLimit simulates rate limiting (429 TooManyRequests)\n\tErrorTypeRateLimit ErrorType = \"rate_limit\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeConnectionRefused simulates connection failures\n\tErrorTypeConnectionRefused ErrorType = \"connection_refused\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable simulates 503 errors\n\tErrorTypeServiceUnavailable ErrorType = \"service_unavailable\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeInternalError simulates 500 errors\n\tErrorTypeInternalError ErrorType = \"internal_error\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeBadRequest simulates 400 errors\n\tErrorTypeBadRequest ErrorType = \"bad_request\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeUnauthorized simulates 401 errors\n\tErrorTypeUnauthorized ErrorType = \"unauthorized\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeForbidden simulates 403 errors\n\tErrorTypeForbidden ErrorType = \"forbidden\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeNotFound simulates 404 errors\n\tErrorTypeNotFound ErrorType = \"not_found\"\n\n\t// ErrorTypeSlowResponse simulates slow (but successful) responses\n\tErrorTypeSlowResponse ErrorType = \"slow_response\"\n)\n\n// ErrorSeverity represents the impact level of an error.\ntype ErrorSeverity string\n\nconst (\n\t// ErrorSeverityLow represents minor errors that may not block operations\n\tErrorSeverityLow ErrorSeverity = \"low\"\n\n\t// ErrorSeverityMedium represents errors that partially impact operations\n\tErrorSeverityMedium ErrorSeverity = \"medium\"\n\n\t// ErrorSeverityHigh represents critical errors that block operations\n\tErrorSeverityHigh ErrorSeverity = \"high\"\n\n\t// ErrorSeverityCritical represents severe errors requiring immediate attention\n\tErrorSeverityCritical ErrorSeverity = \"critical\"\n)\n\n// =============================================================================\n// ENHANCED ERROR SCENARIO\n// =============================================================================\n\n// EnhancedErrorScenario extends ErrorServerScenario with advanced configuration.\ntype EnhancedErrorScenario struct {\n\t// Base scenario configuration\n\tErrorServerScenario\n\n\t// Type is the error category (timeout, rate_limit, etc.)\n\tType ErrorType\n\n\t// Severity indicates the impact level (low, medium, high, critical)\n\tSeverity ErrorSeverity\n\n\t// Frequency controls how often this error occurs (0.0 to 1.0)\n\t// 0.0 = never occurs, 1.0 = always occurs\n\tFrequency float64\n\n\t// Probability controls the chance of occurrence per request (0.0 to 1.0)\n\t// If both Frequency and Probability are set, the effective probability is:\n\t// min(Frequency, Probability) for sequential evaluation\n\t// Frequency * Probability for independent evaluation\n\tProbability float64\n\n\t// RetryAfter specifies the suggested retry duration for rate limits\n\tRetryAfter time.Duration\n\n\t// ErrorCodeOverride overrides the default error code for the type\n\tErrorCodeOverride string\n\n\t// MessageOverride overrides the default error message\n\tMessageOverride string\n\n\t// Intercept determines if the request should be intercepted before processing\n\t// If true, the request fails immediately without processing\n\tIntercept bool\n\n\t// Condition is an optional function that determines if this scenario should apply\n\t// Returns true if the scenario should be triggered\n\tCondition func(*http.Request) bool\n}\n\n// =============================================================================\n// ENHANCED ERROR SERVER\n// =============================================================================\n\n// EnhancedErrorServer extends ConfigurableErrorServer with advanced error injection.\ntype EnhancedErrorServer struct {\n\t*ConfigurableErrorServer\n\n\t// Scenarios holds the enhanced error scenarios\n\tEnhancedScenarios []EnhancedErrorScenario\n\n\t// RequestCounter tracks total requests for frequency calculation\n\tRequestCounter uint64\n\n\t// ErrorCounter tracks errors injected for frequency calculation\n\tErrorCounter uint64\n\n\t// RandomSource provides deterministic randomness for testing\n\tRandomSource *rand.Rand\n}\n\n// NewEnhancedErrorServer creates a new server with enhanced error injection.\n//\n// This server supports advanced error scenarios with severity levels,\n// frequency control, and probability-based injection.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - scenarios: List of enhanced error scenarios\n//\n// Returns:\n//   - *EnhancedErrorServer: Configured enhanced test server\n//\n// Example:\n//\n//\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n//\t    {\n//\t        Type: ErrorTypeRateLimit,\n//\t        Severity: ErrorSeverityMedium,\n//\t        Frequency: 0.3, // 30% of requests\n//\t        RetryAfter: 5 * time.Second,\n//\t    },\n//\t}\n//\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n//\tdefer server.Close()\nfunc NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios []EnhancedErrorScenario) *EnhancedErrorServer {\n\t// Convert enhanced scenarios to base scenarios\n\tbaseScenarios := make([]ErrorServerScenario, len(scenarios))\n\tfor i, scenario := range scenarios {\n\t\tbaseScenarios[i] = scenario.ErrorServerScenario\n\t\t// Apply enhanced defaults\n\t\tif baseScenarios[i].StatusCode == 0 {\n\t\t\tbaseScenarios[i].StatusCode = scenario.getDefaultStatusCode()\n\t\t}\n\t\tif baseScenarios[i].ErrorCode == \"\" && scenario.ErrorCodeOverride == \"\" {\n\t\t\tbaseScenarios[i].ErrorCode = scenario.getDefaultErrorCode()\n\t\t}\n\t\tif baseScenarios[i].Message == \"\" && scenario.MessageOverride == \"\" {\n\t\t\tbaseScenarios[i].Message = scenario.getDefaultMessage()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tbaseServer := NewConfigurableErrorServer(baseScenarios)\n\n\treturn &EnhancedErrorServer{\n\t\tConfigurableErrorServer: baseServer,\n\t\tEnhancedScenarios:        scenarios,\n\t\tRandomSource:            rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())),\n\t}\n}\n\n// NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed creates a server with deterministic randomness.\n//\n// This variant uses a fixed seed for reproducible test behavior.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - scenarios: List of enhanced error scenarios\n//   - seed: Random seed for deterministic behavior\n//\n// Returns:\n//   - *EnhancedErrorServer: Configured enhanced test server with deterministic randomness\nfunc NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios []EnhancedErrorScenario, seed int64) *EnhancedErrorServer {\n\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\tserver.RandomSource = rand.New(rand.NewSource(seed))\n\treturn server\n}\n\n// ShouldInjectError determines if an error should be injected based on configuration.\nfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) ShouldInjectError(scenario EnhancedErrorScenario, r *http.Request) bool {\n\tatomic.AddUint64(&s.RequestCounter, 1)\n\n\t// Check condition first\n\tif scenario.Condition != nil && !scenario.Condition(r) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\t// Check intercept flag\n\tif scenario.Intercept {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate effective probability\n\teffectiveProbability := scenario.Frequency\n\n\t// If both are set, combine them\n\tif scenario.Probability > 0 && scenario.Frequency > 0 {\n\t\t// Independent evaluation: both must pass\n\t\tif s.RandomSource.Float64() > scenario.Probability {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\teffectiveProbability = scenario.Frequency\n\t} else if scenario.Probability > 0 {\n\t\teffectiveProbability = scenario.Probability\n\t}\n\n\t// Roll the dice\n\tshouldInject := s.RandomSource.Float64() < effectiveProbability\n\n\tif shouldInject {\n\t\tatomic.AddUint64(&s.ErrorCounter, 1)\n\t}\n\n\treturn shouldInject\n}\n\n// GetErrorRate returns the actual error rate (errors / total requests).\nfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) GetErrorRate() float64 {\n\ttotal := atomic.LoadUint64(&s.RequestCounter)\n\terrors := atomic.LoadUint64(&s.ErrorCounter)\n\n\tif total == 0 {\n\t\treturn 0.0\n\t}\n\n\treturn float64(errors) / float64(total)\n}\n\n// GetStats returns error injection statistics.\nfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) GetStats() (total uint64, errors uint64, rate float64) {\n\ttotal = atomic.LoadUint64(&s.RequestCounter)\n\terrors = atomic.LoadUint64(&s.ErrorCounter)\n\trate = s.GetErrorRate()\n\treturn\n}\n\n// ResetCounters resets the request and error counters.\nfunc (s *EnhancedErrorServer) ResetCounters() {\n\tatomic.StoreUint64(&s.RequestCounter, 0)\n\tatomic.StoreUint64(&s.ErrorCounter, 0)\n}\n\n// =============================================================================\n// ENHANCED ERROR SCENARIO METHODS\n// =============================================================================\n\n// getDefaultStatusCode returns the default HTTP status code for the error type.\nfunc (s *EnhancedErrorScenario) getDefaultStatusCode() int {\n\tswitch s.Type {\n\tcase ErrorTypeRateLimit:\n\t\treturn 429\n\tcase ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable:\n\t\treturn 503\n\tcase ErrorTypeInternalError:\n\t\treturn 500\n\tcase ErrorTypeBadRequest:\n\t\treturn 400\n\tcase ErrorTypeUnauthorized:\n\t\treturn 401\n\tcase ErrorTypeForbidden:\n\t\treturn 403\n\tcase ErrorTypeNotFound:\n\t\treturn 404\n\tcase ErrorTypeTimeout:\n\t\treturn 408 // Request Timeout\n\tcase ErrorTypeConnectionRefused:\n\t\treturn 503 // Service Unavailable (simulated)\n\tcase ErrorTypeSlowResponse:\n\t\treturn 200 // Success, but slow\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn 500\n\t}\n}\n\n// getDefaultErrorCode returns the default S3 error code for the error type.\nfunc (s *EnhancedErrorScenario) getDefaultErrorCode() string {\n\tif s.ErrorCodeOverride != \"\" {\n\t\treturn s.ErrorCodeOverride\n\t}\n\n\tswitch s.Type {\n\tcase ErrorTypeRateLimit:\n\t\treturn \"SlowDown\" // S3 rate limit error\n\tcase ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable:\n\t\treturn \"ServiceUnavailable\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeInternalError:\n\t\treturn ErrorCodeInternalError\n\tcase ErrorTypeBadRequest:\n\t\treturn ErrorCodeInvalidRequest\n\tcase ErrorTypeUnauthorized:\n\t\treturn \"Unauthorized\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeForbidden:\n\t\treturn ErrorCodeAccessDenied\n\tcase ErrorTypeNotFound:\n\t\treturn ErrorCodeNoSuchKey\n\tcase ErrorTypeTimeout:\n\t\treturn \"RequestTimeout\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeConnectionRefused:\n\t\treturn \"ServiceUnavailable\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeSlowResponse:\n\t\treturn \"\" // No error for slow success\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn ErrorCodeInternalError\n\t}\n}\n\n// getDefaultMessage returns the default error message for the error type.\nfunc (s *EnhancedErrorScenario) getDefaultMessage() string {\n\tif s.MessageOverride != \"\" {\n\t\treturn s.MessageOverride\n\t}\n\n\tswitch s.Type {\n\tcase ErrorTypeRateLimit:\n\t\treturn \"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry later.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable:\n\t\treturn \"Service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry later.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeInternalError:\n\t\treturn \"An internal error occurred. Please retry.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeBadRequest:\n\t\treturn \"The request is invalid or malformed.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeUnauthorized:\n\t\treturn \"Authentication is required to access this resource.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeForbidden:\n\t\treturn \"Access to this resource is denied.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeNotFound:\n\t\treturn \"The specified resource does not exist.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeTimeout:\n\t\treturn \"The request timed out. Please retry.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeConnectionRefused:\n\t\treturn \"Connection to the service failed. Please check your network and retry.\"\n\tcase ErrorTypeSlowResponse:\n\t\treturn \"Request processed successfully\"\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn \"An error occurred. Please retry.\"\n\t}\n}\n\n// =============================================================================\n// CONVENIENCE FUNCTIONS FOR ENHANCED SCENARIOS\n// =============================================================================\n\n// NewRateLimitScenario creates a rate limit error scenario.\n//\n// This convenience function creates a scenario for testing rate limit handling.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - frequency: How often to inject this error (0.0 to 1.0)\n//   - retryAfter: Suggested retry duration\n//\n// Returns:\n//   - EnhancedErrorScenario: Configured rate limit scenario\nfunc NewRateLimitScenario(frequency float64, retryAfter time.Duration) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n\t\t\tStatusCode: 429,\n\t\t\tErrorCode:  \"SlowDown\",\n\t\t\tMessage:    \"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry later.\",\n\t\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"Content-Type\":  \"application/xml\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Retry-After\":   fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0f\", retryAfter.Seconds()),\n\t\t\t\t\"X-RateLimit-Limit\": \"100\",\n\t\t\t\t\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\": \"0\",\n\t\t\t\t\"X-RateLimit-Reset\": fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", time.Now().Add(retryAfter).Unix()),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tType:       ErrorTypeRateLimit,\n\t\tSeverity:   ErrorSeverityMedium,\n\t\tFrequency:  frequency,\n\t\tRetryAfter: retryAfter,\n\t}\n}\n\n// NewTimeoutScenario creates a timeout error scenario.\n//\n// This convenience function creates a scenario for testing timeout handling.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - frequency: How often to inject this error (0.0 to 1.0)\n//   - delay: Delay before responding (simulates slow server)\n//\n// Returns:\n//   - EnhancedErrorScenario: Configured timeout scenario\nfunc NewTimeoutScenario(frequency float64, delay time.Duration) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n\t\t\tStatusCode: 408,\n\t\t\tErrorCode:  \"RequestTimeout\",\n\t\t\tMessage:    \"The request timed out. Please retry.\",\n\t\t\tDelay:      delay,\n\t\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/xml\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tType:      ErrorTypeTimeout,\n\t\tSeverity:  ErrorSeverityHigh,\n\t\tFrequency: frequency,\n\t}\n}\n\n// NewConnectionRefusedScenario creates a connection refused scenario.\n//\n// This convenience function creates a scenario that simulates connection failures.\n// Note: Since we can't actually refuse connections in httptest, we return 503.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - frequency: How often to inject this error (0.0 to 1.0)\n//\n// Returns:\n//   - EnhancedErrorScenario: Configured connection refused scenario\nfunc NewConnectionRefusedScenario(frequency float64) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n\t\t\tStatusCode: 503,\n\t\t\tErrorCode:  \"ServiceUnavailable\",\n\t\t\tMessage:    \"Connection to the service failed. Please check your network and retry.\",\n\t\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/xml\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tType:      ErrorTypeConnectionRefused,\n\t\tSeverity:  ErrorSeverityCritical,\n\t\tFrequency: frequency,\n\t}\n}\n\n// NewSlowResponseScenario creates a slow response scenario.\n//\n// This convenience function creates a scenario for testing slow (but successful) responses.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - frequency: How often to inject this scenario (0.0 to 1.0)\n//   - delay: Delay before responding\n//\n// Returns:\n//   - EnhancedErrorScenario: Configured slow response scenario\nfunc NewSlowResponseScenario(frequency float64, delay time.Duration) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n\t\t\tStatusCode: 200,\n\t\t\tMessage:    \"Request processed successfully\",\n\t\t\tDelay:      delay,\n\t\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/xml\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tType:      ErrorTypeSlowResponse,\n\t\tSeverity:  ErrorSeverityLow,\n\t\tFrequency: frequency,\n\t}\n}\n\n// NewServiceUnavailableScenario creates a service unavailable error scenario.\n//\n// This convenience function creates a scenario for testing 503 error handling.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - frequency: How often to inject this error (0.0 to 1.0)\n//   - retryAfter: Suggested retry duration\n//\n// Returns:\n//   - EnhancedErrorScenario: Configured service unavailable scenario\nfunc NewServiceUnavailableScenario(frequency float64, retryAfter time.Duration) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n\t\t\tStatusCode: 503,\n\t\t\tErrorCode:  \"ServiceUnavailable\",\n\t\t\tMessage:    \"Service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry later.\",\n\t\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/xml\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Retry-After\":  fmt.Sprintf(\"%.0f\", retryAfter.Seconds()),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tType:       ErrorTypeServiceUnavailable,\n\t\tSeverity:   ErrorSeverityHigh,\n\t\tFrequency:  frequency,\n\t\tRetryAfter: retryAfter,\n\t}\n}\n\n// =============================================================================\n// SEVERITY-BASED SCENARIOS\n// =============================================================================\n\n// NewLowSeverityScenario creates a low severity error scenario.\n//\n// Low severity errors typically don't block operations and may be transient.\nfunc NewLowSeverityScenario(errorType ErrorType, frequency float64) EnhancedErrorScenario {\n\treturn EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\tErrorServerScenario: ErrorServerScenario{\n\t\t\tStatusCode: 500,\n\t\t\tMessage:    \"A minor error occurred. =============================================================================\n363\t\n364\tfunc TestNewEnhancedErrorServer(t *testing.T) {\n365\t\tt.Run(\"creates enhanced server successfully\", func(t *testing.T) {\n366\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n367\t\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.5, 5*time.Second),\n368\t\t\t}\n369\t\n370\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n371\t\t\tdefer server.Close()\n372\t\n373\t\t\tif server == nil {\n374\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"Expected non-nil server\")\n375\t\t\t}\n376\t\n377\t\t\tif server.ConfigurableErrorServer == nil {\n378\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected base server to be initialized\")\n379\t\t\t}\n380\t\n381\t\t\tif len(server.EnhancedScenarios) != 1 {\n382\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 1 scenario, got %d\", len(server.EnhancedScenarios))\n383\t\t\t}\n384\t\n385\t\t\tif server.RandomSource == nil {\n386\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected random source to be initialized\")\n387\t\t\t}\n388\t\t})\n389\t\n390\t\tt.Run(\"creates server with empty scenarios\", func(t *testing.T) {\n391\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{}\n392\t\n393\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n394\t\t\tdefer server.Close()\n395\t\n396\t\t\tif server == nil {\n397\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"Expected non-nil server\")\n398\t\t\t}\n399\t\n400\t\t\tif len(server.EnhancedScenarios) != 0 {\n401\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 0 scenarios, got %d\", len(server.EnhancedScenarios))\n402\t\t\t}\n403\t\t})\n404\t}\n405\t\n406\tfunc TestNewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(t *testing.T) {\n407\t\tt.Run(\"creates server with deterministic randomness\", func(t *testing.T) {\n408\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n409\t\t\t\tNewTimeoutScenario(1.0, 100*time.Millisecond),\n410\t\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\t\tseed := int64(12345)\n413\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, seed)\n414\t\t\tdefer server.Close()\n415\t\n416\t\t\tif server.RandomSource == nil {\n417\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"Expected random source to be initialized\")\n418\t\t\t}\n419\t\n420\t\t\t// Test that randomness is deterministic\n421\t\t\tfirstValue := server.RandomSource.Float64()\n422\t\t\tsecondValue := server.RandomSource.Float64()\n423\t\n424\t\t\tif firstValue == secondValue {\n425\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Random source should produce different values\")\n426\t\t\t}\n427\t\n428\t\t\t// Create another server with same seed and verify first value matches\n429\t\t\tserver2 := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, seed)\n430\t\t\tdefer server2.Close()\n431\t\n432\t\t\tfirstValue2 := server2.RandomSource.Float64()\n433\t\t\tif firstValue != firstValue2 {\n434\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected same first value with same seed: %f != %f\", firstValue, firstValue2)\n435\t\t\t}\n436\t\t})\n437\t}\n438\t\n439\tfunc TestEnhancedErrorServer_ShouldInjectError(t *testing.T) {\n440\t\tt.Run(\"respects frequency setting\", func(t *testing.T) {\n441\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n442\t\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(1.0, 5*time.Second), // 100% frequency\n443\t\t\t}\n444\t\n445\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, 999)\n446\t\t\tdefer server.Close()\n447\t\n448\t\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n449\t\n450\t\t\t// With 100% frequency, should always inject\n451\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n452\t\t\t\tif !server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req) {\n453\t\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected error to be injected with 100% frequency\")\n454\t\t\t\t}\n455\t\t\t}\n456\t\n457\t\t\ttotal, errors, rate := server.GetStats()\n458\t\t\tif errors != 10 {\n459\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 10 errors, got %d\", errors)\n460\t\t\t}\n461\t\t\tif rate != 1.0 {\n462\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 100%% error rate, got %f\", rate)\n463\t\t\t}\n464\t\t\tif total != 10 {\n465\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 10 total requests, got %d\", total)\n466\t\t\t}\n467\t\t})\n468\t\n469\t\tt.Run(\"respects zero frequency\", func(t *testing.T) {\n470\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n471\t\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.0, 5*time.Second), // 0% frequency\n472\t\t\t}\n473\t\n474\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, 999)\n475\t\t\tdefer server.Close()\n476\t\n477\t\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n478\t\n479\t\t\t// With 0% frequency, should never inject\n480\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n481\t\t\t\tif server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req) {\n482\t\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected no error injection with 0% frequency\")\n483\t\t\t\t}\n484\t\t\t}\n485\t\n486\t\t\t_, errors, rate := server.GetStats()\n487\t\t\tif errors != 0 {\n488\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 0 errors, got %d\", errors)\n489\t\t\t}\n490\t\t\tif rate != 0.0 {\n491\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 0%% error rate, got %f\", rate)\n492\t\t\t}\n493\t\t})\n494\t\n495\t\tt.Run(\"respects condition function\", func(t *testing.T) {\n496\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n497\t\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(1.0, 5*time.Second),\n498\t\t\t}\n499\t\t\tscenarios[0].Condition = func(r *http.Request) bool {\n500\t\t\t\treturn r.URL.Path == \"/trigger\"\n501\t\t\t}\n502\t\n503\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, 999)\n504\t\t\tdefer server.Close()\n505\t\n506\t\t\treq1, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/trigger\", nil)\n507\t\t\treq2, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/other\", nil)\n508\t\n509\t\t\tif !server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req1) {\n510\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected error injection for matching path\")\n511\t\t\t}\n512\t\n513\t\t\tif server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req2) {\n514\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected no error injection for non-matching path\")\n515\t\t\t}\n516\t\t})\n517\t\n518\t\tt.Run(\"respects intercept flag\", func(t *testing.T) {\n519\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n520\t\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.0, 5*time.Second), // 0% frequency\n521\t\t\t}\n522\t\t\tscenarios[0].Intercept = true\n523\t\n524\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n525\t\t\tdefer server.Close()\n526\t\n527\t\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n528\t\n529\t\t\t// With intercept=true, should inject regardless of frequency\n530\t\t\tif !server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req) {\n531\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected error injection with intercept flag\")\n532\t\t\t}\n533\t\t})\n534\t\n535\t\tt.Run(\"combines frequency and probability\", func(t *testing.T) {\n536\t\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n537\t\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.5, 5*time.Second),\n538\t\t\t}\n539\t\t\tscenarios[0].Probability = 0.5 // Both frequency and probability\n540\t\n541\t\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n542\t\t\tdefer =============================================================================\n796\t\n797\tfunc contains(s, substr string) bool {\n798\t\treturn len(s) >= len(substr) && (s == substr || len(s) > len(substr) && containsHelper(s, substr))\n799\t}\n800\t\n801\tfunc containsHelper(s, substr string) bool {\n802\t\tfor i := 0; i <= len(s)-len(substr); i++ {\n803\t\t\tif s[i:i+len(substr)] == substr {\n804\t\t\t\treturn true\n805\t\t\t}\n806\t\t}\n807\t\treturn false\n808\t}\n809\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"1c6359ed-8292-4efc-9622-b087b7c24b01","uuid":"4b436f32-cade-466e-96ae-c1e7d46a3ed4","timestamp":"2026-07-16T18:46:07.924Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/ARMOR/internal/server/error_server_enhanced_test.go","content":"// response\", ErrorTypeSlowResponse, \"\", \"\"},\n\t\t{\"with override\", ErrorTypeRateLimit, \"CustomCode\", \"CustomCode\"},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tscenario := EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\t\tType:              tt.errorType,\n\t\t\t\tErrorCodeOverride: tt.overrideCode,\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif got := scenario.getDefaultErrorCode(); got != tt.expectedCode {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"getDefaultErrorCode() = %s, want %s\", got, tt.expectedCode)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEnhancedErrorScenario_GetDefaultMessage(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname           string\n\t\terrorType      ErrorType\n\t\texpectedSubstr string\n\t\toverrideMsg    string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\"rate limit\", ErrorTypeRateLimit, \"Rate limit        tt.errorType,\n\t\t\t\tMessageOverride:  tt.overrideMsg,\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tgot := scenario.getDefaultMessage()\n\t\t\tif !contains(got, tt.expectedSubstr) =============================================================================\n// TESTS FOR ENHANCED ERROR SERVER\n// {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.5, 5*time.Second),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\tif server == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"Expected non-nil server\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif server.ConfigurableErrorServer == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected base server to be initialized\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif len(server.EnhancedScenarios) != 1 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 1 scenario, got %d\", len(server.EnhancedScenarios))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif server.RandomSource == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected random source to be initialized\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"creates server with empty scenarios\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{}\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\tif server == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"Expected non-nil server\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif len(server.EnhancedScenarios) != 0 deterministic randomness\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewTimeoutScenario(1.0, 100*time.Millisecond),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tseed := int64(12345)\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, seed)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\tif server.RandomSource == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"Expected random source to be initialized\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Test that randomness is deterministic\n\t\tfirstValue := server.RandomSource.Float64()\n\t\tsecondValue := server.RandomSource.Float64()\n\n\t\tif firstValue == secondValue {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"Random source should produce different values\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Create another server with same seed and verify first value matches\n\t\tserver2 := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, seed)\n\t\tdefer server2.Close()\n\n\t\tfirstValue2 := server2.RandomSource.Float64()\n\t\tif firstValue != firstValue2 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected same first value with same seed: %f != %f\", firstValue, firstValue2)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc TestEnhancedErrorServer_ShouldInjectError(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(\"respects frequency setting\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(1.0, 5*time.Second), // 100% frequency\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, 999)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n\n\t\t// With 100% frequency, should always inject\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t\tif !server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected error to be injected with 100% frequency\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttotal, errors, rate := server.GetStats()\n\t\tif errors != 10 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 10 errors, got %d\", errors)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif rate != 1.0 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 100%% error rate, got %f\", rate)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif total != 10 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 10 total requests, got %d\", total)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"respects zero frequency\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.0, 5*time.Second), // 0% frequency\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, 999)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n\n\t\t// With 0% frequency, should never inject\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\t\tif server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected no error injection with 0% frequency\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, errors, rate := server.GetStats()\n\t\tif errors != 0 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 0 errors, got %d\", errors)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif rate != 0.0 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 0%% error rate, got %f\", rate)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"respects condition function\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(1.0, 5*time.Second),\n\t\t}\n\t\tscenarios[0].Condition = func(r *http.Request) bool {\n\t\t\treturn r.URL.Path == \"/trigger\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServerWithSeed(scenarios, 999)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\treq1, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/trigger\", nil)\n\t\treq2, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/other\", nil)\n\n\t\tif !server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req1) {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected error injection for matching path\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req2) {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected no error injection for non-matching path\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"respects intercept flag\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.0, 5*time.Second), // 0% frequency\n\t\t}\n\t\tscenarios[0].Intercept = true\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n\n\t\t// With intercept=true, should inject regardless of frequency\n\t\tif !server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req) {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"Expected error injection with intercept flag\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"combines frequency and probability\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.5, 5*time.Second),\n\t\t}\n\t\tscenarios[0].Probability = 0.5 // Both frequency and probability\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n\n\t\t// With both set at 0.5, actual injection should be around 0.25 (0.5 * 0.5)\n\t\t// We'll test 1000 times and check that it's reasonable\n\t\tinjections := 0\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 1000; i++ {\n\t\t\tif server.ShouldInjectError(scenarios[0], req) {\n\t\t\t\tinjections++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\trate := float64(injections) / 1000.0\n\t\t// Should be around 0.25, give it some tolerance (0.20 to 0.30)\n\t\tif rate < 0.20 || rate > 0.30 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected injection rate around 0.25, got %f\", rate)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc TestEnhancedErrorServer_GetStats(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(\"tracks statistics correctly\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(0.5, 5*time.Second),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\treq, _ := http.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test\", nil)\n\n\t\t// Make 10 requests\n\t\tfor i := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\ttotal, errors, rate := server.GetStats()\n\n\t\tif total != 0 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 0 total requests, got %d\", TestEnhancedErrorServer_ResetCounters(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(\"resets counters correctly\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(1.0, INTEGRATION\n// =============================================================================\n\nfunc TestEnhancedErrorServer_Integration(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(\"server handles requests with error injection\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios := []EnhancedErrorScenario{\n\t\t\tNewRateLimitScenario(1.0, 5*time.Second), // Always inject\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tserver := NewEnhancedErrorServer(scenarios)\n\t\tdefer server.Close()\n\n\t\t// Make a request\n\t\tresp, err := http.Get(server.URL + \"/test\")\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Request failed: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n\n\t\t// Should get rate limit response\n\t\tif resp.StatusCode != 429 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected status 429, got %d\", resp.StatusCode)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// {\n\t\t\tresp, err := http.Get(server.URL + \"/test\")\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Request %d failed: %v\", i, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif resp.StatusCode == 429 {\n\t\t\t\trateLimitCount++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tresp.Body.Close()\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Should get rate limit every time due to probability=1.0\n\t\tif rateLimitCount != 10 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 10 rate limit responses, got %d\", rateLimitCount)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc TestEnhancedErrorServer_SlowResponse(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(\"slow response scenario works\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tscenarios =============================================================================\n// HELPER FUNCTIONS\n// =============================================================================\n\nfunc contains(s, substr string) bool {\n\treturn len(s) >= len(substr) && (s == substr || len(s) > len(substr) && containsHelper(s, substr))\n}\n\nfunc containsHelper(s, substr string) bool {\n\tfor i := 0; i <= len(s)-len(substr); i++ {\n\t\tif s[i:i+len(substr)] == substr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n","numLines":809,"startLine":1,"totalLines":809}}}
